handled_foot: Three things happened to your home this month. You felt none of them — that's the point.
arch_body: Streaming led your month at 41% of all traffic — your largest "macro" by a wide margin, with social a distant second. A classic evening-and-weekend rhythm: quiet daytime, lively nights. Gaming held steady at 11%, and your smart-home devices kept a low, constant hum in the background.
macro_line: Think of these as your network's macros — like a diet, it's the balance that defines the month. Vs. April you shifted +4 pts toward gaming and eased off social.
suggestions: Have you tried a second Wi-Fi point near the living room?
Your 4K streaming concentrates in one room on weeknights. A mesh node there would smooth playback when several screens are on at once.
Ask us → we keep a couple on hand
Have you considered a streaming-priority tuning?
We can weight your traffic shaping so video never competes with a backup or a big download after 7pm — no buffering during movie night.
Ask us → a 5-minute change, no cost
Have you set up per-device downtime?
Your profile shows steady late-evening gaming. Gentle per-device schedules are easy to add if you'd ever want them — and just as easy to remove.
Ask us → or self-serve in your portal
ally_intro: Your A777ance membership is also a network of people. Based on your household profile, we think you'd hit it off with a member who knows exactly the setup you're running:
ally_blurb: “I'm really good at home-theater calibration, mesh Wi-Fi layouts, and dialing in Plex. Would love to connect.”
